title: [kimi-review] 1bef7e2: [SEVERITY: low] Potential API regression: this makes a previ
description:
Commit: 1bef7e208
Message: fix(routing): validate dst_iid in lichen_router_route

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] Potential API regression: this makes a previously accepted (if unsafe) input now fail with `-EINVAL`. If any
close_reason: Made dst_iid optional with derivation from dst_addr[8:] to avoid API regression while preventing NULL deref in mesh_local path; only touches router.c per scope
